commands.review_summary:
The PR adds native audio/video rendering controls, Open/Download actions, inline PDF previews, CSS for attachment actions, and jsdom tests for assistant chat attachments.

PR surface: Source +93, Tests +99. Total +192 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection for the review finding: structured assistant audio/attachment content can carry an arbitrary URL, and the PR renders that URL directly into Open/Download anchors. I did not run a browser repro because this is a read-only review and the source path is clear.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor changes are needed for the URL-safety finding and real behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not queue a repair marker while contributor-side proof is missing.

target.title: feat(ui): add chat media download controls
target.body:
## Summary
- render assistant audio attachments with native controls in conversation
- render assistant video attachments with native controls in conversation
- add Open and Download actions for assistant media/document attachments, including inline PDF previews

## Verification
- git diff --check
- node --experimental-strip-types --check ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.attachments.test.ts

Vitest was not run in this checkout because vitest/package.json is missing and Corepack pnpm failed locally.
target.author: lily-oc
